sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Here's Why Rigetti Computing, Inc. (RGTI) Fell More Than Broader Market
feed.summary: Rigetti Computing, Inc. (RGTI) shares fell by 2.5% in the last trading session, underperforming the broader market. The company has seen a 22.02% loss in the past month, despite the Computer and Technology sector only losing 4.58%. Investors are awaiting its upcoming earnings report, with EPS projected to increase by 40% and revenue by 173% year-over-year.

feed.title: Rigetti Computing (NASDAQ:RGTI) Trading Down 2.5% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Rigetti Computing (NASDAQ:RGTI) shares dropped 2.5% on Thursday, trading at $14.85 with lower-than-average volume. Despite the dip, the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $32.00 from Wall Street analysts, following strong Q1 earnings that beat expectations. However, several insiders, including a director and the CTO, have recently sold significant amounts of company stock.

feed.title: RBLU ETF Profile: Dividends, Returns (BOATS:RBLU)
feed.summary: The RBLU ETF, issued by Tuttle Capital Management LLC under the T-Rex brand, is designed for bullish bets on Roblox Corp. stock, aiming for 200% daily leveraged exposure through swap agreements. Launched on March 4, 2025, it's a high-risk, short-term tactical tool with an expense ratio of 1.05% and a dividend yield of 5.24%. The ETF invests in cash and tracks the Roblox Corp. Class A stock, with daily rebalancing to maintain its leveraged exposure.

feed.title: AM Best Affirms Credit Ratings of RenaissanceRe Holdings Ltd., Its Core Subsidiaries and Joint Ventures
feed.summary: AM Best has affirmed the credit ratings of RenaissanceRe Holdings Ltd., including its Long-Term Issuer Credit Rating of "a-" (Excellent) with a positive outlook, and the Financial Strength Rating of A+ (Superior) for its core subsidiaries. The positive outlook reflects improvements in operating performance, diversification into specialty and casualty lines, and strong investment returns. The report highlights RenaissanceRe's robust balance sheet, very favorable business profile, and strong enterprise risk management, supported by its ability to combine its own capital with third-party investments.

feed.title: Quest to discuss waste and recycling services on Aug. 6
feed.summary: Quest Resource Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: QRHC) announced it will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Thursday, August 6, 2026. Management will host an earnings conference call on the same day at 5:00 PM ET to discuss the results and business outlook. The company is a national leader in environmental waste and recycling services, and the call will be accessible by phone and webcast.

feed.title: Aberdeen Group plc Reduces Holdings in uniQure NV
feed.summary: Aberdeen Group plc has reduced its holdings in uniQure NV, decreasing its position by 2,458,269 shares and now holding a total of 2,848,117 shares. This transaction, executed at $46.06 per share, represents a strategic adjustment in Aberdeen Group plc's portfolio, with uniQure NV now making up 4.52% of its holdings. uniQure NV, a biotechnology company specializing in gene therapy, faces financial challenges despite its innovative pipeline, with a market capitalization of $2.71 billion and being considered significantly overvalued.

feed.title: Globe Life Earnings Call Balances Growth and Headwinds
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc. (GL) released its Q2 earnings report, showcasing strong premium and profit growth alongside challenges like margin pressure and distribution issues. The company reported double-digit EPS growth, robust investment income, and an increased share buyback program, while also navigating headwinds from health claims volatility, DTC sales disruption due to AI-driven search changes, and initial losses from its new EVRI health platform. Management provided an optimistic outlook, raising its full-year net operating EPS range, despite acknowledging near-term volatility in health claims and continued investment in the EVRI venture.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Self-Reflects on Korean Deal Failures
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley is reportedly engaging in self-reflection following a series of unsuccessful deals in the Korean market. This internal review suggests the firm is assessing its strategies and performance in the region after experiencing multiple failures.

feed.title: Photronics, Inc. (PLAB) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP is inviting investors who suffered losses in Photronics, Inc. (PLAB) to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that between December 10, 2025, and May 27, 2026, Photronics failed to disclose severe bottlenecks in its high-end chip design release pipeline due to elevated foundry utilization rates and equipment cost pressures. Investors have until September 4, 2026, to participate as a lead plaintiff.

feed.title: ROSEN, SKILLED INVESTOR COUNSEL, Encourages Photronics, Inc. Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action – PLAB
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is reminding Photronics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PLAB) investors about an upcoming lead plaintiff deadline of September 4, 2026, in a securities class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased Photronics securities between December 10, 2025, and May 27, 2026, are encouraged to secure counsel, as the complaint alleges the company made false and misleading statements regarding its high-end product pipeline and customer schedules. The firm emphasizes its track record in investor rights litigation and encourages affected investors to join the class action.

feed.title: PCB Bancorp Sets Aug. 14 Payment Date for $0.22 Dividend
feed.summary: PCB Bancorp (NASDAQ: PCB) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.22 per common share. The dividend was declared on July 22, 2026, and will be paid on or about August 14, 2026, to shareholders on record as of August 7, 2026. PCB Bancorp operates PCB Bank, which serves small to medium-sized businesses and individuals primarily in Southern California.

feed.title: Outlook Therapeutics (OTLK) CEO granted 100,000 stock options
feed.summary: Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. (OTLK) CEO Robert Charles Jahr was granted 100,000 stock options at an exercise price of $1.4304 per share under the company's 2024 Equity Incentive Plan. These options, granted on July 21, 2026, will vest fully on July 21, 2027, and expire on July 21, 2036, provided his continuous service to the company. The grant is part of his equity compensation package, leaving him with 100,000 directly held options.

feed.title: Is Campbell’s (CPB) New Protein Soup Line a Real Shift in Its Wellness Strategy?
feed.summary: Campbell's recently launched a new line of Protein Soups, featuring bone broth and 20 grams of protein per can, targeting health-conscious consumers. This initiative, alongside a gluten-free condensed soup partnership, aligns with a focus on health-oriented innovation to counter volume stagnation in traditional products. While the new line contributes to a wellness-focused strategy, analysts have varying expectations for its impact on Campbell's overall financial performance and growth.

feed.title: Does NetApp’s AI Infrastructure Role at StructureCraft Reshape the Bull Case For NTAP?
feed.summary: NetApp's recent collaboration with StructureCraft, providing AI-ready data infrastructure, reinforces its relevance in real-world AI workloads. This partnership, alongside other AI-focused expansions, supports NetApp's investment narrative of durable, profitable growth despite challenges from shifting enterprise storage spending and competition. The company's forecasts project significant revenue and earnings growth by 2029, suggesting a potential 7% upside to its current price according to Simply Wall St's fair value estimation.

feed.title: Charles Schwab CRO Nigel Murtagh sells $422k in shares
feed.summary: Charles Schwab's Chief Risk Officer, Nigel J. Murtagh, recently sold 4,053 shares of company stock for approximately $422,068 through a pre-arranged trading plan. Concurrently, he exercised nonqualified stock options to acquire an equal number of shares. These transactions follow a strong second quarter for Charles Schwab, which saw earnings and revenue surpass analyst expectations, leading to revised price targets from various financial institutions.

feed.title: Is Robert Half Inc (RHI) Undervalued After Q2 Earnings? EPS at $0.26 on $1.336B Revenue -- GF Score: 71/100, 34.8% Undervalued
feed.summary: Robert Half Inc (RHI) reported Q2 2026 earnings with net income of $26 million ($0.26 EPS) on $1.336 billion revenue, down from the previous year, reflecting challenges in the staffing industry. Despite the decline, the Talent Solutions segment saw revenue growth, and the company's CEO noted improving hiring demand. GuruFocus rates RHI as 34.8% undervalued with a GF Score of 71/100, suggesting potential for value investors despite challenges in growth and increased expenses.

feed.title: Planned RDCM (NASDAQ: RDCM) ordinary-share sale and recent trading detailed
feed.summary: An investor connected with RDCM has filed a Form 144, indicating an intent to sell ordinary shares on NASDAQ around July 23, 2026, with Jefferies LLC acting as the broker. The filing also details numerous open market sales of ordinary shares by Lynrock Lake Master Fund LP between April and July 2026, many of which involved significant blocks of shares. Key terms like Form 144, ordinary shares, and open market purchases are defined within the article.

feed.title: Oklo Receives U.S. Department of Energy Startup Authorization for Groves Reactor, Clearing Way for Fuel Loading and First Criticality
feed.summary: Oklo Inc. has received startup authorization from the U.S. Department of Energy for its Groves Isotope Test Reactor, clearing the way for fuel loading and operations. This achievement, reached in just over 10 months, demonstrates Oklo's ability to rapidly deploy advanced nuclear technology on a privately financed greenfield site. The Groves reactor will serve as a low-power test facility to establish operating experience for future commercial-scale isotope production and reduce execution risk for subsequent projects.

feed.title: Provident Financial Holdings Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Provident Financial Holdings, Inc. announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.14 per share. Shareholders of record by August 13, 2026, will receive the dividend, payable on September 3, 2026. The announcement includes a safe-harbor statement regarding forward-looking information.

feed.title: Patterson-UTI Energy Inc (PTEN) Shares Fall 3.6% -- GF Value Says Still Overvalued
feed.summary: Patterson-UTI Energy Inc (PTEN) shares dropped 3.6% to $10.34, but its GF Value™ of $8.03 indicates it's 28.8% overvalued. The stock has a GF Score™ of 63/100, rated as Above Average, with moderate financial strength and profitability but weak momentum. Recent insider selling totaling $11.9 million, coupled with no buying, raises concerns about management confidence and potential investment risks.

feed.title: Did Verizon’s New Gizmo Watch 4 Push Just Shift Verizon Communications' (VZ) Family Ecosystem Narrative?
feed.summary: Verizon Communications recently launched the Gizmo Watch 4, a kid-focused wearable, aiming to leverage ecosystem products and incentives to strengthen household relationships without exposing children to social media or unfiltered web access. While this initiative is incremental to near-term earnings, it contributes to Verizon's strategy of maintaining cash generation through scale, cost cuts, and add-ons in a mature market. Investors are advised to consider the broader context of competitive pressures and significant investments in 5G and fiber alongside these family-focused offerings.

feed.title: Is Conagra Brands Inc (CAG) a Bargain After 3.1% Drop? GF Value Says Undervalued
feed.summary: Conagra Brands Inc (CAG) shares dropped 3.1% to $14.37, trading significantly below its GF Value™ estimate of $24.83, suggesting it is undervalued by 42.1%. Despite this, the stock has a GF Score™ of 58/100, a low predictability rank of 1-star, and a financial strength rating of 4/10, raising concerns about potential value traps and growth challenges. Insider buying of $0.5 million in the last three months indicates confidence from company insiders.

feed.title: Pool Corporation (POOL) Reports 2% Sales Growth in Q2 2026
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (POOL) announced a 2% increase in net sales for Q2 2026, reaching $1.8 billion, driven by strong performance in maintenance services and growing market share in building materials despite new construction challenges. The company's P/E ratio of 16.87x suggests a reasonable valuation compared to historical averages, and its GF Score™ of 69/100 indicates solid overall performance. Positive insider activity, with 5 buying transactions totaling 21,989 shares, further signals confidence in the company's future prospects.

feed.title: Axon Enterprise, Inc. (0HKE) Q1 2025 Earnings Report - Results, Call & Slides
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise, Inc. (0HKE) reported its Q1 2025 earnings, beating analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. The company achieved an actual EPS of $1.41 against a consensus of $1.27, and actual revenue of $603.63 million surpassed the expected $586.39 million, representing a 31.01% year-over-year growth. The next earnings report is estimated for August 5, 2026.

feed.title: 8 rivers capital, NET Power 10% owner, sells $318,693 in stock
feed.summary: 8 Rivers Capital, a 10% owner and Director of NET Power Inc. (NASDAQ:NPWR), recently sold 209,142 shares of Class A Common Stock for a total of $318,693. These transactions occurred between July 21 and July 23, 2026, with prices ranging from $1.5066 to $1.53 per share, bringing the stock below its 52-week low after a nearly 40% decline in six months. The sales were executed indirectly through NPEH, LLC, leaving 2,755,858 shares beneficially owned by the entity.

feed.title: QBUL ETF Profile: Dividends, Returns (BOATS:QBUL)
feed.summary: The QBUL ETF (TrueShares Quarterly Bull Hedge ETF) is an actively managed fund designed to benefit from tail risk or declines in the US large-cap equity market, aiming for protection during high volatility while maintaining income potential. It invests in short-term debt securities and uses call options to mitigate equity risk and pursue growth. The fund distributed a dividend of $2.13 on December 26, 2025, representing a significant increase from the previous year, and has an expense ratio of 0.79%.

feed.title: WEC Energy Group Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group Inc. (WEC) stock rose by 1.11% to $114.72 on Thursday, outperforming the broader market as the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average both fell. This marks the stock's second consecutive day of gains despite an overall grim trading session.

feed.title: Outlook Therapeutics (NASDAQ: OTLK) grants 210,078 stock options to CFO
feed.summary: Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. reported that its Chief Financial Officer, Lawrence A. Kenyon, was granted 210,078 stock options on July 21, 2026. These options, under the company's 2024 Equity Incentive Plan, have an exercise price of $1.4304 per share, vest completely on July 21, 2027, and expire on July 21, 2036, contingent on his continued employment. This insider transaction involves a grant of rights to buy shares, rather than a direct purchase or sale, and aims to align his interests with shareholder value.

feed.title: Coastal Financial Corporation Announces CFO Transition
feed.summary: Coastal Financial Corporation announced that Brandon Soto, EVP and CFO, will depart on August 15, 2026, to become CEO at another financial institution. Joel Edwards, previous Coastal Financial CFO, will step in as Interim CFO. The company will initiate a search for a permanent Chief Financial Officer, considering both internal and external candidates.

feed.title: SMRI ETF Profile: Dividends, Returns (BOATS:SMRI)
feed.summary: The SMRI ETF, managed by Bushido Capital US Equity ETF, invests in undervalued US mid- and large-cap stocks, excluding the financial sector. It employs both quantitative and qualitative analyses, focusing on metrics like ROIC, capital allocation, and free cash flow to identify 30 to 50 stocks trading below their intrinsic value. The ETF has an expense ratio of 0.71% and pays quarterly dividends, with its last dividend amounting to $0.03.

feed.title: PYPL Stock Slips 2% After-Hours — Stripe Weighs Next Move On PayPal While Pursuing $10B OpenRouter Acquisition
feed.summary: Fintech giant Stripe and private equity firm Advent International are re-evaluating their strategy for PayPal Holdings Inc. after their initial $53-billion takeover offer was rejected as too low. Concurrently, Stripe is also in advanced discussions to acquire OpenRouter, an AI marketplace startup, for an estimated $10 billion. This potential acquisition signals Stripe's ambition to expand into the high-growth artificial intelligence infrastructure market beyond its core payment and stablecoin offerings.

feed.title: Bank OZK (OZK) Could Be 4% Undervalued As Earnings Put Recent Weakness In Context
feed.summary: Bank OZK (OZK) recently reported its Q2 2026 results, showing a stock pullback of 1.67% (1-day) and 5.59% (7-day), despite a 5-year return of 45.03%. Simply Wall St. suggests the stock is currently 4.2% undervalued, with a fair value of $52.33 against its closing price of $50.12, primarily due to growth opportunities in Sun Belt regions. However, its high commercial real estate exposure poses a risk to this valuation.
